name: @tootallnate/dds
description: Pure-JS parser for Microsoft DirectDraw Surface (`.dds`) texture files. Reads the 128-byte header (magic + DDS_HEADER + optional DDS_HEADER_DXT10), dispatches block compression to `@tootallnate/bcn` (BC1/BC2/BC3/BC4/BC5) for the common DXTn formats, and returns canonical RGBA8 pixel buffers. Handles uncompressed RGBA / BGRA formats too.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
